no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd/... && cd .. && lefthook run pre-commit

No code changes were needed in this execution worktree because the requested stale-binary warning behavior is already implemented and verified in `cli/cmd/command_factory.go` with coverage in `cli/cmd/version_staleness_test.go`.

Verified in this session:
- `go test ./cmd/...` in `cli/`
- `lefthook run pre-commit` at repo root

The version command already:
- checks the current repo origin for the DDx GitHub URL
- compares the injected build commit against `HEAD`
- prints the required warning to `stderr` when the source tree is ahead
- exits successfully even when detached HEAD is present
